title: Instagram Profile Scraper input
description: Provide one or more Instagram profile URLs. Use Apify Proxy or your own proxy group to reduce blocking. Optional cookies can help with login walls.

profileUrls.title: Profile URLs
profileUrls.description: A list of Instagram profile URLs, e.g. https://www.instagram.com/instagram/

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Recommended for Instagram scraping. Configure Apify Proxy or custom proxies here.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Upper concurrency limit for Playwright pages.

maxItems.title: Maximum results
maxItems.description: Optional cap on the number of profiles to process from the input list.

initialCookies.title: Initial cookies
initialCookies.description: Optional cookies to inject into each browser context before navigating. Useful when Instagram shows a login wall.

overrideUserAgent.title: Override user agent
overrideUserAgent.description: Optional user agent override. Leave empty to use browser fingerprints.

debugLogResponses.title: Debug response capture
debugLogResponses.description: Log matching Instagram JSON responses for debugging extraction issues.
